race.comment: SAMURAI WARRIOR (3) in career best form and backs up quickly after launching late with a sound victory over 1890m at Toowoomba. Backmarker who gets home hard with the weight drop. MAMMOTH MOUNTAIN (5) never travelled in the heavy (10) going with a plugging sixth over 1605m at Coffs Harbour. Down sharply in weight with the 3kg claim and can bounce back on this improving surface. RING AHOY (1) tough gelding who returned to form with a commanding victory over 2100m at Wyong in BM64 class. Claim helps and hard to ignore the recent form. DIPIERDOMENICO (6) not that far away last start when fifth over 1900m at Armidale. Drop in the weights will help his cause in this stiffer race. Place best.
